## How to Assign This to Copilot

1. In the **Assignees** panel on the right, click **Assignees**
2. Select **Copilot** from the list
3. (Optional) Add additional guidance in the **Optional prompt** field
4. Click **Assign** — Copilot will start working in the background!

> 📖 Learn more: [Assigning issues to Copilot](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/how-tos/use-copilot-agents/cloud-agent/start-copilot-sessions#assigning-an-issue-to-copilot)
